How to add the GiggleLogo image

This imageset references three files:
  - GiggleLogo.png (1x)
  - GiggleLogo@2x.png (2x)
  - GiggleLogo@3x.png (3x)

To add the logo to your app:
1. Place the logo image files in this directory. Use PNG or JPEG. For best results, provide three sizes: 1x, 2x and 3x. The @2x and @3x files should be approximately 2x and 3x the pixel dimensions of the 1x image.
2. In Xcode, open Assets.xcassets and confirm the "GiggleLogo" imageset shows the images. Xcode will manage the asset catalog references.

If you want me to add the actual PNG(s) for you, upload them here and I'll add them into the imageset automatically.
